function:src/openhuman/devices/store.rs:conn.execute(
            "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO paired_devices \
             (channel_id, label, device_pubkey, core_session_token_hash, \
              shared_secret_encrypted, created_at, last_seen_at, revoked) \
             VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, NULL, ?5, NULL, 0)",
            params![
                channel_id,
                label,
                device_pubkey,
                core_session_token_hash,
                now
            ],
        ).context

function:src/openhuman/doctor/core.rs:targets
        .into_iter()
        .map(|provider| ModelProbeEntry {
            provider,
            outcome: ModelProbeOutcome::Skipped,
            message: Some("model catalog refresh removed".to_string()),
        }).collect
